title: cota × ochroleuca
intro: Cota × ochroleuca, also known as Oxeye Daisy or False Oxeye Daisy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cota × ochroleuca include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Cota × ochroleuca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
